rationale: Title text, bar color, baseline, quarter labels, stagger choreography, hold, and fade-out all match the brief, but the value labels render as integers (8, 9, 11, 14) instead of the required one-decimal strings (8.2, 9.1, 11.4, 14.0), which is wrong text content and caps fidelity at 2. Layout is clean: bars are proportional to values, evenly spaced, with labels centered on bars and nothing clipped. The filmstrip shows a coherent build — title first, bars growing left-to-right with count-up labels riding the bar tops, a hold, then a dim-out — though the final frame retains a faint residual image rather than a complete fade. Typography and rounded bar tops look deliberate and near-broadcast quality, so one revision pass to fix the decimal labels and final fade would make it shippable.
